revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Niheihimegami Shrine
Text replacement - "is a shrine in the Engishiki Jinmyōchō." to "is a shrine in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]."
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
Text replacement - "| RONSHA ||" to "| {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|WD=Q135022904}}[[Category:RONSHA]] ||"
Text replacement - "Category:RONSHA" to "Category:Shikinai Ronsha"
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (upgraded script - full property sections, ILL links, P361 categorization)
Bot: Generate standardized Shikinaisha page (V8 - proper ILL deity links, P13677 URLs, province extraction)
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v9.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | native_name = 迩幣姫神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Niheihimegami Shrine'''|迩幣姫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
* {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|ja|神社|de|Shintō-Schrein|zh|神社|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|ru|Дзиндзя|WD=Q845945}} * {{ill|Shikinai Successor|WD=Q135022918}}
== said to be the same as (P460) ==
* {{ill|Nihehimeno Shrine|WD=Q135041112}}
[[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Successor]]
{{wikidata link|Q135070142}}

revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | native_name = 迩幣姫神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Shinto shrine]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

revision.comment: Bot: Create shrine page for Niheihimegami Shrine
adding dummy category to make categories work
v25: Standardize page format
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | native_name = 迩幣姫神社 | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Niheihimegami Shrine (Q135070142) | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Niheihimegami Shrine'''|迩幣姫神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]].
== instance of (P31) ==
